main.description: A single node in a Blento page graph — a container (layout) or a leaf (content unit). The frozen envelope; new types extend the open blobs only.

parent.description: rkey of the containing node. Omit for a page/document root.

rank.description: Fractional order key among siblings (string, never a float).

page.description: Denormalized root document id this node belongs to (query/partition key).

data.description: Content blob. Pure JSON, never markup.

source.description: Optional declared read capability (atproto-collection | http | subscribe).

layout.description: Position within parent, interpreted by the parent container type. Integers only.

style.description: Appearance intent (color role, variant). Never concrete CSS.
